purpose: Provide exact setup and verification commands for production SSH GitHub secrets needed by prod-runtime-redeploy.yml.

currentEvidence.organizationSecretCheck: gh secret list --org kimwoonggon returned HTTP 404

incidentRemediation.issue: Placeholder setup commands were accidentally executed by an unquoted heredoc.
incidentRemediation.productionImpact: none observed; the run failed in Prepare SSH before server execution
incidentRemediation.remediation: Bogus secrets were deleted; gh secret list again shows only PROMOTION_TOKEN.

rerunCommand: gh workflow run prod-runtime-redeploy.yml --repo kimwoonggon/woong-blog-aspcore-nextjs --ref main -f base_url=https://woonglab.com -f repo_dir=/root/service/woong-blog-aspcore-nextjs -f work_read_path=/api/public/works/smoke-fluid-simulation -f study_read_path=/api/public/blogs/c-gc%EB%93%B1-%EB%B6%80%ED%95%98%ED%85%8C%EC%8A%A4%ED%8A%B8-%EC%9D%B4%ED%9B%84-%EA%B2%80%EC%A6%9D%ED%95%AD%EB%AA%A9 -f run_real_load=true -f 'rates=100 200 300 400' -f duration_seconds=30 -f max_vus=500 -f pre_allocated_vus=100
nextRequiredAction: Add the required production SSH secrets using real production values, then rerun the workflow.
